title: ux-Switch
text: ux-Switch This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-Switch properties. ux-Switch widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-Switch Maps to physical widget: of type boolean Default definition: ux-Switch=uxSwitch() Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Toggle button to display Boolean state Related Links uxswitch The uxswitch widget is a toggle field control. It always contains a field value, even if it is not a valid Boolean. Unlike the checkbox widget, the uxswitch widget does not provide the indeterminate state, so null value or empty ("") value results in a format error. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
